info.title: Vristo POC API
info.description: API documentation for Vristo POC - Sales Admin Dashboard

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search in description, log_name, causer name or email

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: Filter by event type (created, updated, deleted)

200.description: Activity log details with causer and subject

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password. Returns user data or 2FA challenge.

200.description: User data with roles and permissions

422.description: Validation error or user not found
Cannot modify protected roles or validation error

200.description: List of all permissions and grouped permissions

post.description: Generate QR code, secret, and recovery codes for 2FA setup

200.description: 2FA setup initiated with QR code and recovery codes

post.description: Verify TOTP code to complete 2FA setup

403.description: Cannot delete self or last admin

sanctum.description: Laravel Sanctum cookie-based authentication. Login via POST /api/login first.
